message:
Fix evaluator type qualification and update test outputs

- Use `function_use::evaluator` instead of unqualified `evaluator`
- Update test reference outputs to include detailed XML parse errors

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,7 +62,7 @@
   x: "<Event><System>",
   y: null,
 }
-warning: failed to parse Windows Event XML
+warning: failed to parse XML: line 1:15: no element found
   --> tests/functions/parse/parse_winlog.tql:54:5
    |
 54 | y = x.parse_winlog()

@@ -49,7 +49,7 @@
   x: "<not-closed",
   y: null,
 }
-warning: failed to parse XML
+warning: failed to parse XML: line 1:0: unclosed token
   --> tests/functions/parse/parse_xml.tql:13:5
    |
 13 | y = x.parse_xml(xpath="/*")
